jobs.name: Memory Dreaming Promotion
jobs.description: [managed-by=memory-core.short-term-promotion] Promote weighted short-term recalls into MEMORY.md (limit=10, minScore=0.800, minRecallCount=3, minUniqueQueries=3, recencyHalfLifeDays=14, maxAgeDays=30).

jobs.name: Boss Dashboard Live Publisher
jobs.description: Every 5 min: publishes a sanitized dashboard summary to GitHub so the Vercel phone dashboard shows latest safe numbers.

jobs.name: Procurement Material Request Watcher - Every 30 min
jobs.description: Checks ERP for new Material Requests every 30 min 08-17 and announces them to the procurement group. Runs as a Python script (not an agent) to avoid session spin-up timeouts.

jobs.name: RM Barcode Allocator (Python)
jobs.description: End of every working day (17:30 Sat-Thu): scans BCI-Raw Material submitted items created in the last 30 days, assigns next free RM###### barcode + uploaded Code128 image to any item missing one. Silent automation, no outbound messaging.

jobs.name: ERP Monitor (Python)
jobs.description: Runs erp_monitor.py every 30 min 8-17: checks for new employees, items, POs to check, leave requests, new projects â†’ notifies boss via WhatsApp.

jobs.name: ChemAnalyst Weekly Price Scraper (B1)
jobs.description: Weekly Saturday 06:00: pulls quarterly USD/MT prices from ChemAnalyst public pages for caustic soda, methanol, polyols, MDI, TDI, PU resin. Feeds the RFQ decider so BCI quotes that match a stale LPR can be flagged when the underlying commodity has moved 10%+ since last buy.

jobs.name: DN/SO EOD Digest (Python)
jobs.description: Runs dn_so_notifier.py daily at 17:30: one end-of-day digest per salesman summarizing today's new Delivery Notes and Sales Orders. (Was every 30 min 8-17; reduced to cut nag volume â€” re-enable old expr if reverting.)

jobs.name: Shipment Delay Checker (Python)
jobs.description: Runs shipment_delay_checker.py every 30 min 24/7: checks for delayed shipments â†’ DMs driver and alerts delivery group.

jobs.name: BCI Store DN/SO Reconciliation (Python)
jobs.description: Every 30 min from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: checks new BCI Delivery Notes in Completed/To Bill state, compares items and quantities with linked Sales Orders, and asks the relevant store WhatsApp group only when something is suspicious. Follow-up replies can still be handled by the delivery agent outside this window. First run bootstraps without sending old backlog.

jobs.name: BCI Store WhatsApp DN Creation Reminders (Python)
jobs.description: Every hour from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: checks BCI store WhatsApp delivery requests that still have no Delivery Note in ERP and reminds the original sender in the relevant store group.

jobs.name: BCI Store WhatsApp Delayed Intake Flush (Python)
jobs.description: Every minute from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: flushes delayed BCI store media/screenshot messages after the burst window, sending at most one classified reply per sender burst.

jobs.name: MR Lead Time Checker (Python)
jobs.description: Runs mr_leadtime_checker.py every 15 min 08-17: sends ONE overdue MR per cycle to procurement group, re-alerts every 3 days.

jobs.name: Raw Material Shortage Reminder (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 09:08: reminds Javed by personal WhatsApp DM about BCI-Raw Material items below safety stock/short/projected short, then sends one next-day follow-up if no Purchase Material Request exists.

jobs.name: Quotation Follow-up (Python)
jobs.description: Runs quotation_followup.py daily at 9:30 AM: reminds salesmen about open quotations not converted to orders (24h first, then every 3 days). Action-time slot â€” after target-tracker hook lands at 08:00, salesmen are settled in and ready to call customers about live quotes.

jobs.name: Salesman Target Tracker (Python)
jobs.description: Runs salesman_target_tracker.py daily at 8:29 AM Asia/Riyadh except Friday and ERP Employee holiday-list dates: per-salesman MTD invoiced net sales vs monthly target, rank, top customers, plus a warm daily site-visit expectation. Uses Sales Invoice posting_date/net_total so totals align with accounting. Voice+text lands before customer-facing time.

jobs.name: Salesman Visit Tracker - Noon (Python)
jobs.description: Runs salesman_visit_tracker.py at 12:00 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: nudges active BCI salesmen who have not logged any Salesperson site visit yet today (no numbers in the message) and sends Sameh a team roll-up when his team is behind. Daily minimum (8) is judged internally, never stated to salesmen.

jobs.name: Salesman Visit Tracker - 15:30 (Python)
jobs.description: Runs salesman_visit_tracker.py at 15:30 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: nudges active BCI salesmen still below the internal daily minimum of submitted Salesperson site visits (no numbers in the message) and sends Sameh a team roll-up when his team is behind. Daily minimum (8) is judged internally, never stated to salesmen.

jobs.name: Salesman Visit Tracker - Boss EOD (Python)
jobs.description: Runs salesman_visit_tracker.py at 17:45 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: sends boss an exception summary (with counts) for active BCI salesmen still below the daily minimum of 8 submitted Salesperson site visits.

jobs.name: Rent Installment Reminder (Python)
jobs.description: Runs rent_reminder.py daily at 9 AM: sends 15-day-ahead WhatsApp reminders to boss and Uzair for each Rent Contract installment. Adnan outbound is blocked.

jobs.name: Truck Arrival Alert (Python)
jobs.description: Alerts delivery group 30 min before a truck reaches its destination. Runs 24/7 for overnight long-distance trips.

jobs.name: Unengaged Trucks Reminder (Python)
jobs.description: Reminds delivery group every 3 hours about trucks with no active Delivery Trip today.

jobs.name: Oil Change Checker (Python)
jobs.description: Alerts delivery group when a truck exceeds 9,000 km since last oil change. Uses Vehicle Log odometer data.

jobs.name: Marketing Weekly Content Planning
jobs.description: Saturday 9AM: plans the next week's content calendar and posts it to BCI Marketing group for batch approval.

jobs.name: Marketing Calendar Post Request - Shakir
jobs.description: Date-aware Sun-Thu 8AM job: follows weekly_plan.json, asks Shakir for scheduled visuals, then routes captions to boss approval.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing (Python)
jobs.description: Sends daily 8 AM curated brief to Eng. Muhammad: collections due, pending approvals, sales snapshot, yesterday's recap.

jobs.name: Collections Intelligence Brief (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 10 AM deep-dive into overdue receivables: aging buckets, top 10 debtors, chase priority list. Arabic, to Eng. Muhammad DM.

jobs.name: PO Approval Notifier (Python)
jobs.description: Every 10 min from 08:00 to 17:59 Asia/Riyadh: refreshes the pending_actions registry and pushes any newly-pending PO to Eng. Muhammad via WhatsApp for quick-reply approval.

jobs.name: APC PO Notifier -> Anas (Python)
jobs.description: Every 30 min 08:00-17:00: sends new APC Purchase Orders to Anas (APC manager) via WhatsApp.

jobs.name: Register Pending PO Approvals (Python)
jobs.description: Safety-net refresh of the pending_actions whitelist at 8:05 AM and 2:00 PM so boss can approve POs via WhatsApp reply throughout the day.

jobs.name: Marketing Watchdog â€” Every 2 Hours Business Hours
jobs.description: Sun-Thu every 2 hours 9AM-5PM Riyadh: reminds boss about pending marketing approvals with varied value-based nudges, checks overdue tasks, and stays silent if nothing needs action.

jobs.name: End-of-Day Summary (Python)
jobs.description: Sends daily 6 PM scorecard to Eng. Muhammad: today's completed work, approvals, still-pending items.

jobs.name: Salesman Overdue Collections (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 1 PM reminder to each BCI salesman about overdue customer collections on their accounts. Moved from morning bundle (08:00 hook + 09:30 quote follow-up was already two messages); collections is the heaviest, lands in post-lunch admin slot when salesmen have energy for chasing money rather than starting the day with bad news.

jobs.name: Rental Overdue Checker (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 09:00 Asia/Riyadh: scans SH (Sharafat Aliemar) rental contracts. Sends boss overdue digest; reminds tenants 15d/3d before due date, on due date, then every 3d overdue until paid. Tenant replies route to rental-tenant support.

jobs.name: APC/BCI Rental Payment Reminder (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 08:30 Asia/Riyadh (no Friday): approved APC/BCI Rental Contracts — reminds HR group about rent installments + electricity bills at 30/7/3/1 days before due and on due date (skips rows already Paid, re-checked fresh each run), overdue nudge every 3d until paid, lease expiry notices at 90/30/7/0 days before end_date.

jobs.name: RFQ Email Poller (Python)
jobs.description: Polls dedicated procurement IMAP inbox every 3 min for supplier replies; correlates by Message-ID / subject / sender; hands body to rfq_quote_ingest. Enabled 2026-05-19 (Adyan): supplier email outbound + inbound channels live.

jobs.name: RFQ Group Notifier Safety Net (Python)
jobs.description: Catches up any po_drafted RFQ rounds whose group/boss notification was missed (e.g. fire-and-forget subprocess killed). Idempotent.

jobs.name: Boss Dashboard - Regenerate
jobs.description: Rebuilds workspace/dashboard/index.html every hour from cron/jobs.json + sent_log.json + value_model.json. Read-only file write, safe on Fridays.

jobs.name: Etimad Tender Watcher (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 08:00: scrapes tenders.etimad.sa for new public tenders, filters to APC scope (Building Construction + Civil Works, all KSA), sends Arabic voice + text digest to boss DM. Friday-gated. Boss-DM preview phase before pushing to projects group.

jobs.name: HR Fleet Document Expiry Reminder (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 08:00 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: checks Fleet doctype for operation card / license / insurance / inspection / Fahs expiries and posts alerts to the HR group at 7/1-day buckets, then weekly once overdue. Sends all due expired documents.

jobs.name: HR Employee Iqama + Contract Expiry Reminder (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 08:00 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: checks the Employee doctype and posts to the HR group. Iqama alerts at 7 and 1 days before expiry; a weekly Tuesday digest of currently-expired iqamas (recently-expired listed, older backlog counted); contract renewal alerts at 65 and 61 days before contract_end_date (61-day only if not yet renewed), for employees that have a contract and do not have renewal disabled.

jobs.name: Fleet Accident Follow-up (Python)
jobs.description: Every 2 working-hours Sunday-Thursday: follows open Fleet Incident Details accident cases from local state, reminds the HR group for Najm/Taqdeer/claim/payment/legal next steps, and keeps timing metadata out of ERP. (Moved fleet group -> HR group 2026-06-09; HR group is now the primary home for the accident workflow, fleet group remains a fallback for reports.)

jobs.name: LinkedIn Playwright Safe Auto Daily
jobs.description: Daily 8:30 Riyadh: uses Playwright on BCI LinkedIn Page Admin, sends limited safe outreach/replies, and alerts boss for important items.

jobs.name: Gateway Watchdog (Python)
jobs.description: Every 5 min: probes the OpenClaw gateway WhatsApp listener. Alerts Adyan via Telegram (direct HTTPS, no gateway dependency) after 10 min down, escalates to Telegram+Twilio SMS after 60 min down, repeats critical hourly, and sends a single 'recovered' message when the listener comes back. Bypasses the cron PAUSE flag so it keeps watching during maintenance. NO failureAlert via WhatsApp — that's the channel it watches.

jobs.name: Support Collections Queue Refresh (Python)
jobs.description: Every hour 08-17 Asia/Riyadh: reads ERP Accounts Receivable and writes a sanitized pending-payment queue for the separate support OpenClaw. No WhatsApp sends.

jobs.name: Item Price Reply Promoter (Python)
jobs.description: Sweeps parsed PL-/ALT-/SP- stubs in rfq_state.json into Item Price docs and Alternative Item rows in ERP. Idempotent; safe to re-run.

jobs.name: Item Price Outreach - Every 5h (drain BCI supplier price gap)
jobs.description: Runs item_price_outreach.py every 5 hours (skip Friday). Batches ~50 supplier emails per run; rate-limited by Zoho naturally. Gap-compute is idempotent; deferred suppliers are picked up automatically on the next run. Drains the 320-supplier price-list backlog over ~25h, then continues filling gaps as new items / suppliers appear.

jobs.name: Boss Instruction Instant Watcher (Python)
jobs.description: Every minute except Friday: checks recently modified boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records and WhatsApp-notifies the assigned employee about newly added task rows for today.

jobs.name: Boss Instruction Reminder (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 14:00 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: checks open boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records and WhatsApp-notifies each assigned employee about today's task rows only, with the ERP list link.

jobs.name: Salesman Material Request Watcher (Python)
jobs.description: Every 5 min Asia/Riyadh, all 7 days (no Friday gate, boss wants full coverage): watches ERP Salesman Material Request status. Open notifies boss (Arabic); Sent to Store notifies active Store Person(s) of the source warehouse (English, Arabic override for Roushdy); Received notifies salesman + boss (Arabic). Per-doc/per-state/per-recipient dedup; first rollout bootstrapped to avoid backlog spam.

jobs.name: Cash Receipt Group Watcher (Python)
jobs.description: Every minute Asia/Riyadh, all 7 days: watches ERP Cash Receipt lifecycle and announces ERP-recorded receipt, driver received, and accountant received milestones to the relevant BCI delivery/store WhatsApp group. Draft/created receipts stay silent. Per-doc/per-stage/group dedup; first rollout bootstrapped to avoid backlog spam.

jobs.name: Employee Daily Activity Report Reminder (Python)
jobs.description: Daily 16:30 and 17:30 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: reminds active Office Staff Rakah - BCI employees who have not submitted today's Employee Daily Activity Report. Script also skips per-employee ERP holiday-list dates and includes the ERP form link.

jobs.name: Technical Support Notifier - Every 5 min 08-17
jobs.description: Bridges the Technical Support thread: notifies Asim of new requests + completions (English) and the salesman of technical replies/comments (Arabic). Polls ERP docs + comments. Python script (no agent spin-up).

jobs.name: Boss Instruction Reply Watcher (Python)
jobs.description: Every minute except Friday: watches ERP comments on boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records. Staff replies notify boss; boss replies notify the assigned employee.
